SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.core

Class KeYMediator

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.core.KeYMediator
public class KeYMediator extends Object
The KeYMediator provides control logic for the user interface implemented in Swing.

Attention: Logic to apply rules has to be implemented user interface independent in the ProofControl!

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    KeYMediator(AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl ui)
    creates the KeYMediator with a reference to the application's main frame and the current proof settings

    finishAutoMode(Proof proof, boolean fullStop, boolean interactive, Runnable selection)
    performs the standard preparations for starting automode call this.startInterface(fullstop) call getUI().getProofControl().fireAutoModeStopped(proof) call this.setInteractive(interactive) select a node/proof by running the given selector (null means the default selection is used)

    fires that a GUI component that has asked for modal access has been closed, so views can be enabled again

    fires the request of a GUI component for modal access this can be used to disable all views even if the GUI component has no built in modal support

  • Constructor Details

    • KeYMediator

      public KeYMediator(AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl ui)
      creates the KeYMediator with a reference to the application's main frame and the current proof settings

  • Method Details

    • registerProofLoadListener

      public void registerProofLoadListener(Consumer<Proof> listener)
      Register a proof load listener. Will be called whenever a new proof is loaded, but before it is replayed. The listener MUST be able to accept the same proof twice!
      Parameters:
      listener - callback

      public NotationInfo getNotationInfo()
      returns the used NotationInfo

      the used NotationInfo

      public void fireModalDialogOpened(EventObject e)

      fires that a GUI component that has asked for modal access has been closed, so views can be enabled again

      public void closedAGoal()

      public int getNrGoalsClosedByAutoMode()

      public void resetNrGoalsClosedByHeuristics()

    • stopInterface

      public void stopInterface(boolean fullStop)

    • startInterface

      public void startInterface(boolean fullStop)

    • initiateAutoMode

      public void initiateAutoMode(Proof proof, boolean fullStop, boolean interactive)
      performs the standard preparations for starting automode
      1. call this.stopInterface(fullstop)
      2. call getUI().getProofControl().fireAutoModeStarted(proof)
      3. call this.setInteractive(interactive)
      Parameters:
      proof - the Proof to be worked on
      fullStop - if a full freeze of the interface is requested
      interactive - whether the needed taclet index is for interactove or automatic use (normally false)

    • finishAutoMode

      public void finishAutoMode(Proof proof, boolean fullStop, boolean interactive, Runnable selection)
      performs the standard preparations for starting automode
      1. call this.startInterface(fullstop)
      2. call getUI().getProofControl().fireAutoModeStopped(proof)
      3. call this.setInteractive(interactive)
      4. select a node/proof by running the given selector (null means the default selection is used)
      Parameters:
      proof - the Proof to be worked on
      fullStop - if a full freeze of the interface is requested
      interactive - whether the needed taclet index is for interactive or automatic use shoul be selected (normally true)
      selection - a Runnable that selects the correct node after unfreezing the interface

    • isInAutoMode

      public boolean isInAutoMode()
      Checks if the auto mode is currently running.
      Returns:
      true auto mode is running, false auto mode is not running.

    • lookup

      public <T> T lookup(Class<T> service)
      Retrieves a user-defined data.
      Type Parameters:
      T - any class
      Parameters:
      service - the class for which the data were registered
      Returns:
      null or the previous data
      See Also:
      • register(Object, Class)

      Register a user-defined data in this node info.
      Type Parameters:

      Parameters:
      obj - an object to be registered
      service - the key under it should be registered

      Type Parameters:

      Parameters:

      service - the key under which the data was registered

    • enableWhenProofLoaded

      public void enableWhenProofLoaded(Action a)

    • enableWhenProofLoaded

      @Deprecated public void enableWhenProofLoaded(AbstractButton a)
      Deprecated.
      Disable certain actions until a proof is loaded. This is a workaround for a broken proof macro menu in the GUI. Remove this method as soon as another solution can be found.

      public long getAutomaticApplicationTimeout()
      besides the number of rule applications it is possible to define a timeout after which rule application shall be terminated
      Returns:
      the time in ms after which automatic rule application stops

    • setAutomaticApplicationTimeout

      public void setAutomaticApplicationTimeout(long timeout)
      sets the time out after which automatic rule application stops
      Parameters:

      public AutoSaver getAutoSaver()
      Returns the AutoSaver to use.
      Returns:
      The AutoSaver to use or null if no AutoSaver should be used.

    • getCurrentlyOpenedProofs

      public @NonNull List<Proof> getCurrentlyOpenedProofs()
      Provides a list of currently opened view.

      You can use this instance directly inside your components or add a listener to observe changes.
